rationale: The current best script already wins with late soft quant-aware snaps, but it still perturbs every quantized tensor as soon as endgame adaptation begins. Recent near-misses suggest projection layers are the most compression-sensitive while broader quantizer changes are mostly flat. This variant keeps the winning ramp and LR split, but makes the first quant-aware rounds projection-only, then expands to full-model roundtrips for the final snaps. The hypothesis is that early endgame adaptation should target the most score-critical projection weights first, preserving more general-model fit before the last full quantized alignment.
title: Projection-Warm Quant-Aware Expansion
